rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex syntax
Preserve existing architecture when repairing AGREE annexes
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers in AGREE annexes
Place component type contracts in type annexes and implementation bindings in implementation annexes
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Avoid implementation-level references in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use concrete bounds or visible relations in assumptions and guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not add architecture to fix AGREE errors; repair the annex instead
